# module__pl330_target_axi authoring notes

Authored `pl330_target_axi` as the PL330 target AXI behavior-owner module for packet `module__pl330_target_axi`. The RTL declares the packet-required AXI parameters, exposes internal request/response streams, drives external AXI AW/W/B/AR/R channels, implements ready/valid backpressure with skid buffering, and tracks read/write outstanding ordering.

Locked truth remains unchanged. This packet does not claim rtl-gen PASS because the global authoring plan has pass_allowed=false and production locked-truth gates remain open outside this module packet.
